ddls:
CREATE TABLE "moves" (
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the move */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the move's type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the move's category */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the move's contest */,
  "power" INTEGER /* Power of the move */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the move */,
  "generation" TEXT /* Generation when the move was introduced */,
  "pp" INTEGER /* Power Points of the move */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Description of the move's effect */,
  "target" TEXT /* The target of the move */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the move in battle */,
  "is_z_move" INTEGER /* Indicates if the move can be used as a Z-Move */,
  "introduced_in_game" TEXT /* The specific game or version where the move was introduced */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the move */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_contest_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_id") REFERENCES contests ("contest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "effective_against" TEXT /* Types that this type is super effective against */,
  "not_effective_against" TEXT /* Types that this type is not very effective against */,
  "ineffective_against" TEXT /* Types that this type has no effect against */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "description_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contests" (
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contest category */,
  "contest_name" TEXT /* Name of the contest category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contest category */,
  "appeal_points" INTEGER /* Points the move can earn in the contest */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the contest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move relationship */,
  "move_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first move in the relationship */,
  "move_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second move in the relationship */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., similar effects, special interactions) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_relations_move_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("move_id_1") REFERENCES moves ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_relations_move_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("move_id_2") REFERENCES moves ("move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage statistic */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move */,
  "context_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gaming context */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the move has been used */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the move in the context */,
  "usage_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of usage in the context */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the usage statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_usage_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_usage_context_id FOREIGN KEY ("context_id") REFERENCES contexts ("context_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contexts" (
  "context_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gaming context */,
  "context_name" TEXT /* Name of the gaming context */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gaming context */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("context_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., enthusiast, developer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the move */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the move was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the move */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the move */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moveset_simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move used in the simulation */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battle scenario */,
  "result" TEXT /* Outcome of the simulation */,
  "opponent_move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move used by the opponent in the simulation */,
  "simulation_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the simulation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the simulation result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moveset_simulations_opponent_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moveset_simulations_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id")
)
